nasb.text: Let God arise, let His enemies be scattered, And let those who hate Him flee before Him.

esv.text: God shall arise, his enemies shall be scattered; and those who hate him shall flee before him!

cnv.text: 願　神興起，願他的仇敵四散； 願恨惡他的人從他面前逃跑。

ccb.text: 愿上帝起来驱散祂的仇敌， 使恨祂的人四散奔逃。

csbs.text: 愿神兴起，愿他的仇敌四散； 愿恨恶他的人从他面前逃跑。
